codeReview.summary: Most Onboard parity updates are implemented correctly (help icons, handshake BackLink removal, failed-variant styling tokens, and dashboard handoff), but one explicit expected behavior remains unmet on Enter Package.

issues.description: Feature expectedBehavior requires the primary CTA on /demo/onboard-enter-package to remain disabled until BOTH onboarding package and password are filled. Current logic enables the button based only on package validity (`const validation = validatePackageString(packageString)` and `disabled={!validation.valid}`), so a valid package with empty password enables navigation to /onboard/handshake.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared guidance conflicts with mission validation reality for styling classes: AGENTS/skill say not to use Tailwind utility classes, but validation-contract requires exact Tailwind-style class tokens for alert variants.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md:49 ('No Tailwind utility classes'); .factory/skills/ui-builder/SKILL.md:84 ('Do NOT use Tailwind utility classes'); validation-contract.md:312 and 317 require `bg-[#EAB3081A]` / `bg-[#EF44441A]` token assertions, and implementation uses them at src/screens/OnboardScreens.tsx:302-303.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature metadata for onboard appears stale versus validation contract/Paper references, which can misdirect workers and reviewers.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json:990 references `onboard-failed-expired`; features.json:993/995 mention 'Begin Handshake' and 'Finish' copy. Current contract/Paper use timeout variant + 'Begin Onboarding' and 'Save & Launch Signer' (validation-contract.md:311-317, 321-323).

summary: Reviewed worker session 50f2047d-23ea-41f5-aab9-2d4afd34a288, commit 490d914. The implementation is close to parity and generally solid, but it misses one stated behavior gate: Enter Package CTA enablement does not require password input. Marking this feature as fail pending that fix.
